final:
module top_module(
    input A1,
    input A2,
    input B1,
    output X
);assign X = (!A1 & A2) | (A1 & !A2) | (!B1 & (A1 | A2)) | (A1 & A2);

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      X <= ~A1 & ~A2; // Intentionally misleading condition
      X <= A1 & A2 & B1; // Intentionally misleading condition
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts:
X <= ~A1 & ~A2; // Intentionally misleading condition
X <= A1 & A2 & B1; // Intentionally misleading condition
